html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

Dragonfly Light KitDragonfly Light

The Dragonfly Light is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together.

The Dragonfly Light can be deployed on a Mast or Winged Sail. It is mutually exclusive with the Lightning Conductor. It provides up to 6 minutes of light and can be fueled with the same efficiency as a Campfire. Unlike Fire Pits, Wavey Jones will extinguish it instantly no matter how much Fuel it has, rather than reducing it by one stage at a time.

Gallery

  • A Dragonfly Light when on top of a mast.
  • A Dragonfly Light when on top of a mast.

"An illuminating mast attachment."

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
Dragonfly Light KitDragonfly Light
“I'm full of bright ideas.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“Alternatively, I could just set the mast on fire.”
–Willow, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“Put fire up high. Is safer that way.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“A meager light to combat the darkness.”
–Wendy, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“LIGHT-PRODUCING MAST UPGRADE”
–WX-78, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“I'm always in need of a good reading light.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“That'll lighten things up around here.”
–Woodie, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“Far more practical than setting a fire on our boat.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“We shall keep the flame burning bright!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“Now our boat can have a light!”
–Webber, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“It does lighten the mood considerably.”
–Warly, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“Night light”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“One less thing cluttering up the deck.”
–Winona, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“A light to lead us through the night.”
–Wortox, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“Tall boat light!”
–Wurt, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“I guess it's safer than having a campfire on the deck...”
–Walter, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“I feel a little better now.”
–Wanda, when examining a Dragonfly Light Kit
“Aww, just look how its eyes light up when it sees me!”
–Wilson, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“There's fire in its eyes.”
–Willow, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“Tiny fire beast will light the way.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“How long before that fire in your eyes goes out?”
–Wendy, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“IT WAS MADE TO RESEMBLE AN ORGANIC. TRAGIC”
–WX-78, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“An eclectic design, but no less useful.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“It's mighty nice lookin' up there.”
–Woodie, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“How dare you look down on me!”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“It watches over me.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“We feel a lot better having a night light around.”
–Webber, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“The petite dragon watches over us.”
–Warly, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“Glowy friend watching”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“Looks nice perched up there.”
–Winona, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“How kind to share your bright glare!”
–Wortox, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“Have pretty glowy eyes.”
–Wurt, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“Did I ever tell the story about the sea creature with the big glowing eyes?”
–Walter, when examining a Dragonfly Light
“A bit unsettling, but at least it casts a decent light.”
–Wanda, when examining a Dragonfly Light
The Dragonfly Light is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together.
The Dragonfly Light can be deployed on a Mast or Winged Sail. It is mutually exclusive with the Lightning Conductor. It provides up to 6 minutes of light and can be fueled with the same efficiency as a Campfire. Unlike Fire Pits, Wavey Jones will extinguish it instantly no matter how much Fuel it has, rather than reducing it by one stage at a time.
